name: GPS Alliance Holdings Limited
summary: GPS Alliance Holdings Limited provides real estate agency services in Singapore. It operates through the divisions Real Estate Agency Business, Property Development and Investment Business, and Home Solutions Business. The company offers various real estate services, including corporate leasing services, investment sales, commercial and industrial sales, en-bloc sales, full-time sales, training and seminars, and local and international project sales. It also provides consultancy services to investors and property developers; marketing and sales services; and property management services. Further, the company offers interior design and fit-out works, including kitchen and wardrobe cabinetry, partition work, and installation of false ceilings and fire doors. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Singapore.
